entities.name: LEGUMES
entities.description: Leguminous crops recognized for nutritional value and soil fertility enhancement

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL SIGNIFICANCE
entities.description: The importance of legumes in providing essential nutrients

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: The capacity of legumes to improve soil nutrient levels

entities.name: CEREALS
entities.description: Grain crops used as a benchmark for research investment compared to legumes

entities.name: PRODUCTION
entities.description: The act of growing and harvesting crops

entities.name: CONSUMPTION
entities.description: The use of crops for food

entities.name: TRADE
entities.description: The commercial exchange of crops between regions or countries

entities.name: DEVELOPING COUNTRIES
entities.description: Regions where legume production is often limited to marginal rainfed areas and struggles to meet demand

entities.name: DEVELOPED COUNTRIES
entities.description: Regions with high resources that lead in legume production and export

entities.name: MARGINAL RAINFED AREAS
entities.description: Land areas dependent on rain for production, causing yield and price variability

entities.name: YIELDS
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area

entities.name: PRODUCER PRICES
entities.description: Prices received by farmers for their crops

entities.name: FARM-GATE PRICES
entities.description: Prices of crops at the farm level before transportation or marketing

entities.name: FABABEAN
entities.description: A specific food legume produced and exported by developed countries

entities.description: A specific food legume produced and exported by developed countries

entities.description: A specific food legume produced and exported by developed countries

entities.description: A specific food legume produced and exported by developed countries
